subject: Revert "[AAI][SPARKY] Updating the sparky config"
commit_message:
Revert "[AAI][SPARKY] Updating the sparky config"

This reverts commit ef13604954fe3b16ca210ea6ec4d1bf9ec6076c4.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Change-Id: Ic5e957710501be303e3f20f40f2d731ca900336b
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

Patch Set 1:

Could someone explain to me why this could have caused any gating failures? Sparky should be standalone and not in gating tests currently.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Could someone explain to me why this could have caused any gating failures? Sparky should be standalone and not in gating tests currently.

Will, no worries this is just for testing purpose. It shouldn't be the one but looking at commits around that date none of them looks really suspicious so we are just trying to shoot around hoping that we can isolate the root cause of failure.

Don't be afraid this commit is not intended to be merged it's only here to trigger the gating that will do the testing for us in the automated way

Abandoned

basic_vm test succeeds without this revert (unwinding to 18.02) is enough
